overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic urban environment with heavy infrastructure overpasses, neon signage, and moderate vehicle traffic. The scene transitions from a covered walkway through a busy street crossing into a narrow commercial alley illuminated by vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk next to a teal construction wall with orange barriers

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements above the street
futuristic curved elevated roadway ramp with white structural elements
tall teal-colored construction barrier wall with red graffiti markings
orange plastic traffic barriers lining the edge of the walkway
tall street lamps with orange glowing lights along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered urban walkway with a large digital screen visible ahead. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a teal construction wall on the right and orange barriers on the left, with a curved elevated ramp structure visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection under overpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: navigating through moderate vehicle traffic with futuristic cars and taxis passing by
emerging from shadow into bright sunlight streaming between the buildings ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the street through traffic, moving from the sidewalk into the road crossing area

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic taxi driving along the street with headlights on
dark sedan approaching from the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard with red background and character advertisement mounted on metal framework
traffic light gantry with illuminated signals spanning across the road
massive concrete and steel girders supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection under massive concrete overpasses. The camera moves through moderate traffic including yellow taxis and sedans while transitioning from shadow into bright sunlight. A prominent vertical advertising billboard stands in the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with pawn shop

events.description: small compact car passes by on the right side of the frame near the sidewalk
character with distinctive purple hair runs across the path from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a pawn shop, following the flow of pedestrians in the covered area

notable_agents.action: character with purple hair and white jacket running across the street from left to right
person standing at the pawn shop window browsing items

entered.detail: small yellow and green pawn shop booth with illuminated signage and service window
stacks of cardboard boxes and debris piled near the pawn shop
striped yellow and black caution barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrower covered section, the camera passes a pawn shop kiosk on the left with cardboard boxes piled nearby. A character with purple hair runs across the path, and a small compact car passes on the right. The area is darker with artificial lighting dominating.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial alley with karaoke signs

events.description: ambient light decreases significantly as the area becomes darker, making the neon signs more prominent and vibrant

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley illuminated by vibrant neon signage and commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt browsing at the pawn shop counter

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters in red and blue lighting
illuminated hotel sign with 'El Coyote' text in red neon
multi-level concrete parking garage with open levels on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment progresses through a dark narrow alley dominated by vibrant neon signage. A large vertical karaoke sign in Japanese characters glows on the right, while the El Coyote hotel sign illuminates the area ahead. The pawn shop remains visible on the left as the camera moves deeper into the covered commercial zone.

events.description: approaching the bright exit of the covered street into a more open and illuminated area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright light at the end of the covered street, passing parked vehicles on the right

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete building facade with multiple windows rising on the left
large structural archway framing the bright exit ahead
cluster of illuminated advertising screens visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the darkest section of the alley toward a bright exit ahead. The neon karaoke sign is now prominent on the right, while a tall concrete building rises on the left. The camera approaches a large archway structure leading to a more open, brightly lit area in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured urban walkway through a sunlit intersection and into a dark, neon-drenched commercial alley. It begins under a covered walkway, moving along a concrete sidewalk bordered by teal construction walls and orange barriers toward a large digital screen. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide intersection under massive concrete overpasses, transitioning into bright sunlight amidst yellow taxis and a prominent vertical billboard. The environment then shifts back into a narrower, dimly lit covered section where a purple-haired character dashes across the path near a pawn shop kiosk. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into a dark alley dominated by glowing Japanese karaoke signs and the El Coyote hotel illumination, moving past tall concrete walls toward a bright archway exit in the distance.
